mapper.select: select * from product where creattime >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 7 DAY) and status=1 order By creattime desc;
select * from product where status=1 and sid in (2) and sid in (13,14) and sid in (29,30,31,32,33) and sid in (20,21) order by clicks desc;
select u.id uid,u.username,u.userimgpath,c.* from comment c,user u where c.uid=u.id and c.pid=#{value} order by c.id desc;
select count(*) from userlove where uid=#{uid} and pid=#{pid}
select p.* from userlove u,product p where u.pid=p.id and u.uid=#{value}
select p.*,ifnull(op.status,0) opstatus,op.oid oid from product p left join order_product op on op.pid=p.id where uid=#{value} order by creattime desc
mapper.delete: delete from userlove where uid=#{uid} and pid=#{pid}
mapper.update: update comment set status=#{status} where id=#{id}
update product p,order_product op set p.status=2,p.payed=2 where p.id=op.pid;
mapper.select: select p.* from recommend r,product p where r.pid=p.id and p.status=1 order by creattime desc;
mapper.update: update order_product set status=#{status} where oid=#{oid} and pid=#{pid};
